groups.blurb: Full Iceberg catalogs with real identity, in local Docker.

items.name: polaris-keycloak-client-id
items.title: Polaris + Keycloak (client credentials)
items.blurb: SQE mints each user's token via the OIDC password grant, then passes it through to Polaris.

items.name: polaris-keycloak-user-token
items.title: Polaris + Keycloak (user token)
items.blurb: Clients bring a pre-minted Keycloak token; SQE validates it and passes it through.

items.name: nessie
items.title: Project Nessie
items.blurb: Nessie as the Iceberg REST catalog, auth-less, anonymous SQE.

items.name: unity-oss
items.title: Unity Catalog OSS
items.blurb: Unity Catalog OSS over Iceberg REST (read-only; catalog-browse demo).

groups.blurb: Managed AWS catalogs, bootstrapped and torn down with CDK.

items.name: aws-s3-tables
items.title: AWS S3 Tables
items.blurb: Managed Iceberg; CDK bootstrap + teardown; SQE creates the namespace and round-trips.

items.name: aws-glue
items.title: AWS Glue Data Catalog
items.blurb: Glue + S3; SQE creates the database and does a full create / write / read round-trip.

items.name: glue-lake-formation
items.title: AWS Glue + Lake Formation
items.blurb: Lake-Formation-governed Glue: denied until an explicit LF grant, then succeeds.

groups.blurb: One binary, no server, DuckDB-shaped local SQL.

items.name: embedded-files
items.title: Query local & remote files
items.blurb: Read CSV / JSON / Parquet directly with the read_* table functions. No server, no catalog.

items.name: embedded-sqlite-catalog
items.title: Persistent local catalog (SQLite)
items.blurb: A persistent, SQLite-backed Iceberg catalog on local disk.

items.name: attach-catalogs
items.title: Attach multiple catalogs
items.blurb: Attach several persistent catalogs in one session and JOIN across them.

items.name: quack
items.title: Quack (DuckDB wire protocol)
items.blurb: SQE's DuckDB Quack RPC endpoint, both directions.

groups.blurb: Run SQE like you mean it.

items.name: observability
items.title: Observability: metrics + Grafana
items.blurb: Scrape SQE's Prometheus metrics with VictoriaMetrics and visualise them in Grafana.

items.name: benchmark
items.title: TPC-H / TPC-DS / SSB
items.blurb: Generate, load, and run the TPC suites against SQE with per-query timings.
